announcements.title: 📸 Share Your Screenshots!
announcements.body: We need your help! To submit Peak to the public App Store we need real gameplay screenshots from testers. Please send a few screenshots of your games — the board, a win screen, anything that looks great — to peak.strategy.official@gmail.com.

announcements.title: 💬 Join Our Discord
announcements.body: Connect with other Peak players, coordinate online games, and share feedback in our community Discord. Join here: https://discord.gg/zPTtN4JCuQ

announcements.title: 📧 Feedback & Suggestions
announcements.body: Have a comment, bug report, or recommendation? We want to hear from you. Reach out directly at peak.strategy.official@gmail.com

announcements.title: Online Multiplayer — Alpha Testing
announcements.body: Online multiplayer is live! During the alpha phase there won't be many players online at once, so if you'd like to try it out please coordinate your games around 7 PM Central Time to give yourself the best chance of finding an opponent.
